entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Awarded from Deepmines Bounties .

• Purchased from Nightcap for 80 Fergolyte , requiring Rank 3 - Seeker with him to purchase.

• Purchased from the Market for 20 Platinum 20 .
[ edit | edit source ]

methods.sourceCanonical: Recall: Prime Vanguard
methods.sourceDisplayName: 佩里塔叛乱：回忆·Prime 先锋

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • 75 Ascaris Prime is awarded upon completion of The Old Peace quest.

• Awarded from The Perita Rebellion 's Recall: Vanguard:
 • Every Order completed in the Recall: Vanguard awards 1 Ascaris Prime.

• Defeating the Prime Vanguard awards 10 Ascaris Prime.

• In The Steel Path , defeating Commandeered Warframes (outside of the Prime Vanguard fight) may drop 2 Ascaris Prime, regardless of the Recall mission.

• Not affected by Resource booster.

• Can be bought from Marie Leroux in La Cathédrale , Sanctum Anatomica , in quantities of 15 in exchange for Agnovidisc , Laudavi , and/or Servoris . These purchases are limited to one per day, and are on a rotating basis.

• Can be bought from the Market as part of the Tektolyst Artifact Acquisition Pack , in quantities of 150 for 175 Platinum 175 . This bundle can only be purchased once.

methods.sourceCanonical: Venus/Vesper Relay (Follie's Hunt)
Follie's Hunt Atramentum Balloons
methods.sourceDisplayName: Follie 的狩猎中的墨痕气球

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 After completing the Chains of Harrow quest, the Vesper Relay becomes a playable gamemode - Follie's Hunt .

 Completing Follie's Hunt will reward 15 Atramentum ( 25 in The Steel Path ).

 During Follie's Hunt, 12 Atramentum Balloons will spawn in, with each dropping 2 - 4 Atramentum ( 3 - 6 in The Steel Path ). Atramentum Balloons can only be destroyed with weapon damage; Atramentum Balloons are immune to ability damage.

 Atramentum is not affected by Resource Booster , Resourceful Retriever , or Loyal Retriever .

methods.sourceCanonical: The Circuit Steel Path

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Ballistica Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Ballistica with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

methods.sourceCanonical: Deepmines Bounties
methods.sourceDisplayName: 深矿赏金

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Blister Stalk can be harvested in the Deepmines Nutrient Plant of Weed The Garden Deepmines Bounty .
 • May be awarded randomly as a bonus bounty reward at the end of the mission, appearing just beside the extraction elevator.

• Can be purchased for 10 Fergolyte from Nightcap , requiring Rank 1 - Unknowing .

 | Location
 |
 | Mushroom |
 | Effect
 |

 | Deepmines Nutrient Plant
(Stage 2-5 zone in Weed The Garden bounty)
 |
 | Blister Stalk
 |
 | Weapons inflict Heat Damage. Spawns six false Syzygy Shockwave MOAs that surround and follow the player while dancing in place.
 |

 | Thorn Tooth
 |
 | Weapons inflict Puncture Damage. Both the player and any enemies they damage will be impaled with ethereal Skana s.
 |

 | Gamma Berry
 |
 | Weapons inflict Radiation Damage. The player's head temporarily inflates.
 |

 | Nonono
 |
 | Weapons inflict Void Damage. Player is surrounded by Void energy, audible laughter plays on pickup, and the buff description reads "Is someone watching?"
 |

methods.sourceCanonical: Deepmines Bounties
methods.sourceDisplayName: 深矿赏金

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Borica can be harvested in the Deepmines Forward Base of Corporate Restructuring Deepmines Bounty .
 • May be awarded randomly as a bonus bounty reward at the end of the mission, appearing just beside the extraction elevator.

• Can be purchased for 10 Fergolyte from Nightcap , requiring Rank 2 - Curious .

 | Location
 |
 | Mushroom |
 | Effect
 |

 | Deepmines Forward Base
(Stage 2-5 zone in Corporate Restructuring bounty)
 |
 | Winter Spear
 |
 | Weapons inflict Cold Damage. Greatly increases Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity , and greatly reduces Friction .
 |

 | Ironwood
 |
 | Weapons inflict Impact Damage. Player is surrounded by particle effects similar to those of Prism . Enemies hit will likewise produce said particle effects.
 |

 | Spring Popper
 |
 | Weapons inflict Blast Damage. Enemies hit by weapons are thrown upwards with a Ragdoll effect.
 |

 | Borica
 |
 | Weapons inflict Corrosive Damage.
 |

[ edit | edit source ]
 Chromatic Atramentum is purchased from Aspirant Zorba for 360 Atramentum .

[ edit | edit source ]
 After completing Jade Shadows: Constellations , Scoria's Angel node becomes available. It can be started either from within Pontis Tower , or directly from Railjack Navigation.

 • Completing Scoria's Angel , Uranus Proxima will reward 12 - 16 Crimson Talent ( 18 - 22 in The Steel Path ).

• Additional Crimson Talent (up to 12?) can be rewarded by taking down all targets during the Ramsled transition phase.

methods.sourceCanonical: The Circuit Steel Path

entries.acquisitionEvidence:

 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Destreza Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Destreza with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

 | Location
 |
 | Mushroom |
 | Effect
 |

 | Deepmines Lab

 |

 | Vomval Trumpet

 | Weapons inflict Tau Damage. Spawns a false Eidolon Vomvalyst that floats near the player.
 |

[ edit | edit source ]
 • 75 Lyroic Bridge is awarded upon completion of The Old Peace quest.

• Awarded from The Perita Rebellion 's Recall: Hunhullus :
 • Every Order completed in the Recall: Hunhullus awards 1 Lyroic Bridge.

• Defeating the Hunhullus awards 10 Lyroic Bridge.

• In The Steel Path , defeating Commandeered Warframes (outside of the Prime Vanguard fight) may drop 2 Lyroic Bridge, regardless of the Recall mission.

• Not affected by Resource booster.

• Can be bought from Marie Leroux in La Cathédrale , Sanctum Anatomica , in quantities of 15 in exchange for Agnovidisc , Laudavi , and/or Servoris . These purchases are limited to one per day, and are on a rotating basis.

• Can be bought from the Market as part of the Tektolyst Artifact Acquisition Pack , in quantities of 150 for 175 Platinum 175 . This bundle can only be purchased once.

• 10 Lyroic Bridge can be obtained from the mission " The Guilty " ( Hardmode Boss ) in The Perita Rebellion , as a repeated mission clearing reward.

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The Descendia :
 • Potentially awarded in quantities of 5 on Infernums 2, 4, 9, 11, 16, and 18.

• Potentially awarded in quantities of 15 on Infernums 2, 9, and 16 on The Steel Path .

• Dropped from Storage Containers .

• Drops are not affected by Resource Booster or Loyal Retriever / Resourceful Retriever .

• Can be bought from Marie Leroux in La Cathédrale , Sanctum Anatomica , in quantities of 10 in exchange for Agnovidisc , Laudavi , and/or Servoris . These purchases are limited to one per day.

methods.sourceCanonical: Follie's Hunt

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Nightmare Tatters can be obtained by:

 • Completing the operation variant of Follie's Hunt during the event; where each completion of the mission will reward 3 Nightmare Tatters , or 4 on Steel Path .
 • Pick up to 3 pickups resembling Maxim Medallions while in the operation variant of the gamemode, which rewards everyone with 2 Nightmare Tatters per medallion, or 3 on Steel Path .

• Completing any Nightmare Mode missions that appears across the Origin System, which rewards players with 10 Nightmare Tatters .

methods.sourceCanonical: The Circuit Steel Path

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Obex Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Obex with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • 75 Ren Hypercore is awarded upon completion of The Old Peace quest.

• Awarded from The Perita Rebellion 's Recall: Dactolyst :
 • Every Order completed in the Recall: Dactolyst awards 1 Ren Hypercore.

• Defeating the Dactolyst awards 10 Ren Hypercore.

• In The Steel Path , defeating Commandeered Warframes (outside of the Prime Vanguard fight) may drop 2 Ren Hypercore, regardless of the Recall mission.

• Not affected by Resource booster.

• Can be bought from Marie Leroux in La Cathédrale , Sanctum Anatomica , in quantities of 15 in exchange for Agnovidisc , Laudavi , and/or Servoris . These purchases are limited to one per day, and are on a rotating basis.

• Can be bought from the Market as part of the Tektolyst Artifact Acquisition Pack , in quantities of 150 for 175 Platinum 175 . This bundle can only be purchased once.

 |
 | Mushroom |
 | Effect
 |

 | Deepmines Forward Base
(Stage 2-5 zone in Corporate Restructuring bounty)
 |
 | Winter Spear
 |
 | Weapons inflict Cold Damage. Greatly increases Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity , and greatly reduces Friction .
 |

 | Ironwood
 |
 | Weapons inflict Impact Damage. Player is surrounded by particle effects similar to those of Prism . Enemies hit will likewise produce said particle effects.
 |

 |

 | Borica

 | Weapons inflict Corrosive Damage.

entries.acquisitionEvidence:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Thunder-Button can be harvested in the Deepmines Labs of the Critter Liberation Deepmines Bounty .
 • May be awarded randomly as a bonus bounty reward at the end of the mission, appearing just beside the extraction elevator.

• Can be purchased for 10 Fergolyte from Nightcap , requiring Rank 1 - Unknowing .

 | Location
 |
 | Mushroom |
 | Effect
 |

 | Deepmines Lab
(Stage 2-5 zone in Critter Liberation bounty)
 |
 | Thunder-Button
 |
 | Weapons inflict Electricity Damage. The player's movement speed and melee attack speed increases, as if under the effects of Speed .
 |

 | Devil's Cap
 |
 | Weapons inflict Slash Damage. The player's eyes glow bright red. Damaging enemies will cosmetically sever limbs and create additional blood and gore effects.
 |

 | Ferrofungus
 |
 | Weapons inflict Magnetic Damage. Player is followed by a group of Sprodlings that match their Warframe's colors.
 |

 | Vomval Trumpet
 |
 | Weapons inflict Tau Damage. Spawns a false Eidolon Vomvalyst that floats near the player.
 |
